raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "asserting a principle of personal agency that prioritizes internal mental factors over external conditions as the decisive influence on life outcomes",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "thoughts, vision, and ideals are the primary causal determinants of whether a person falls, stays, or rises",
    "present environment exerts no decisive limiting or enabling force on outcomes",
    "individuals possess sufficient control over their thoughts and ideals to shape their trajectory",
    "success or failure is ultimately an internal, volitional matter"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent as an idealistic assertion of mind-over-circumstance, but logically incomplete because it treats environment as irrelevant without justifying why structural constraints would not interact with or override mental factors",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the audience must be capable of acting on internal reframing, environmental barriers must be surmountable through mindset alone, and the goal must be motivational self-direction rather than systemic analysis",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "environmental, structural, or material factors are in fact primary determinants of outcomes, or the statement is used to dismiss real constraints and attribute all results solely to personal vision"
}
